# Next Steps {.unnumbered}

Now that you have mastered the basics of the data visualization in R, below are some resources to extend your learning.

## Workshops

Please visit [LibCal](https://libcal.smu.edu/calendar?cid=15527&t=g&d=0000-00-00&cal=15527&cm=8175&inc=0) to register for additional workshops.

## Online Resources

- [ggplot2: Elegant Graphics for Data Analysis (3e)](https://ggplot2-book.org/) *by Hadley Wickham et. al.*

- [Fundamentals of Data Visualization](https://clauswilke.com/dataviz/) *by Claus O. Wilke*

## Other Resources

- [The Visual Display of Quantitative Information](https://www.edwardtufte.com/book/the-visual-display-of-quantitative-information/) *by Edward Tufte*
